articles.title: Best States for Lower Utility Bills in 2026
articles.draft_markdown:
# Best States for Lower Utility Bills in 2026

## Why this matters
A side-by-side breakdown of electricity, natural gas, and water-cost trends by state to help movers identify lower monthly utility burdens.

## Key takeaway
Focus keyword: **utility costs by state**

## Who this is for
Households planning a move within 6 months

## Next step
Compare local numbers at https://databyarea.com/utility-costs/best-states-lower-utility-bills-2026/

articles.title: Property Tax Hotspots to Avoid Overpaying
articles.draft_markdown:
# Property Tax Hotspots to Avoid Overpaying

## Why this matters
Highlights counties where property-tax burdens are rising fastest and explains how to compare effective rates before buying.

## Key takeaway
Focus keyword: **property tax by county**

## Who this is for
Homebuyers researching county-level tax exposure

## Next step
Compare local numbers at https://databyarea.com/property-taxes/property-tax-hotspots-to-avoid-overpaying/

articles.title: How to Compare Insurance Costs Before Relocating
articles.draft_markdown:
# How to Compare Insurance Costs Before Relocating

## Why this matters
Framework for evaluating insurance premiums by state and city, plus simple ranges to estimate annual variance.

## Key takeaway
Focus keyword: **insurance costs by state**

## Who this is for
Families balancing housing and insurance budgets

## Next step
Compare local numbers at https://databyarea.com/home-insurance/compare-insurance-costs-before-relocating/
